hero.title: Exceptional Catering
hero.subtitle: From intimate family gatherings to large corporate events, Ria's Cuisine delivers unforgettable culinary experiences with authentic African flavors and international favorites.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive catering solutions tailored to make your event truly memorable.

items.title: Wedding Catering
items.description: Elegant menus and full-service catering for weddings. We create memorable dining experiences that complement your special day.

items.title: Corporate Catering
items.description: Professional catering for meetings, conferences, and business events. Impress your clients and colleagues with exceptional cuisine.

items.title: Birthday Celebrations
items.description: Customized menus for birthdays and private parties. Let us make your celebration deliciously unforgettable.

items.title: Family Events
items.description: Food for reunions, anniversaries, and family gatherings. Bringing families together through the joy of great food.

items.title: Community & Cultural Events
items.description: Large-scale catering for festivals and community celebrations. We handle events of any size with professionalism and care.

items.title: Custom Catering
items.description: Personalized catering solutions tailored to any event. Your vision, our culinary expertise — the perfect pairing.

about.title: About Ria's Cuisine
about.subtitle: Passionately bringing people together through exceptional food.
about.paragraph1: Ria's Cuisine is passionate about bringing people together through exceptional food. While rooted in African culinary traditions, we create customized menus to suit every event and every guest.
about.paragraph2: Our mission is to make every celebration memorable through outstanding cuisine and professional service.
about.tagline: Made with love, served with passion

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from the clients who trust us to make their events extraordinary.

items.name: Sarah & James
items.content: Ria's Cuisine made our wedding day absolutely perfect. The food was outstanding, and the presentation was elegant. Our guests are still raving about the jollof rice!

items.name: Michael T.
items.content: We hired Ria's Cuisine for our annual conference. Professional, punctual, and the food was exceptional. They handled 300+ guests seamlessly.

items.name: Amara K.
items.content: The customized menu for my son's birthday was a hit! The kids loved the food, and the adults appreciated the authentic African flavors. Highly recommend!

items.name: Community Center
items.content: For our cultural festival, Ria's Cuisine delivered beyond expectations. Their ability to cater to diverse dietary needs while maintaining quality is impressive.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Ready to make your event unforgettable? Tell us about your event and we'll create the perfect menu.
